default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up to discuss progress, address issues, and plan for the upcoming week.](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to improve attention to detail and client-specific requirements to minimize edits](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Emphasize early problem-solving: raise doubts at assignment stage to prevent compounding issues](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [New Q3 pillar templates introduced to streamline assignment process](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Time management and strategy improvements needed to reduce overall time spent on articles](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Topics

### Quality Control and Client Requirements

  - [Specific client needs must be met (e.g., Rapid needs subtitles, Strappy needs "in brief" bullets)](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Attention to detail crucial to avoid wasted edits](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Vivek encourages raising doubts early in the process to prevent compounding issues](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Team should share high-level article approaches in chat for quick feedback](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [New templates for Q3 pillars introduced to streamline assignment process](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Kirk working on automation for assignment flow](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Strapi publishing automation needed; ticket to be created](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Data grid process adjustments: Timmy to publish directly after fixing formatting issues](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Time Management and Efficiency

  - [Goal: 60-90 minutes average time per article](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Timmy reported spending more time than intended due to strategy mistakes](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Nika faced challenges with Emicronia and data grid erasure](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Team encouraged to be more conscious of potential issues early in the process](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Client-Specific Updates

  - [Rapid: Subtitles needed for all headers, focus on pain points or benefits](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Strappy: Two articles in progress, including e-commerce microservices architecture](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Data grid: Full load expected for next week](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

### Article Review Process

  - [Nika to spot-check 1-2 of Timmy's data grid articles](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Vivek handling Strappy comparison pages for next week](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to fill out Andy's Airtable with delivered articles within 2-3 hours](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Implement new Q3 pillar templates in upcoming assignments](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Timmy to send a couple of data grid articles for Nika's review on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Vivek to handle Strappy comparison pages for the upcoming week](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Team to continue raising doubts and sharing high-level approaches early in the process](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Nika to complete remaining articles (1 Strappy, 1 Rapid) and focus on publishing freelancer articles](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Vivek to assist with publishing if needed](https://fathom.video/share/r2RkgGqCXxAnjEjmydRJT8F9ANmYuM8H?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
